creator: tr@econsci.net
text:
when attempting to do a new 4.0R install on my system, after I receive the message
"waiting 15 seconds for SCSI devices to settle", I get the error message:

sym0: PCI STATUS = 0x8100 (noperiph:sym0:0:-1:-1): SCSI BUS reset
detected. sym0:0: ERROR (40:0) (e-ae-0) (0/5) @ (script 88:1e000000).
sym0: script cmd = 82030000
sym0: regdump: da 10 80 05 47 00 00 0e 00 0e 00 ae 80 00 blah, blah ...

This error message dumps to the screen in a continuous stream, and never stops.
Obviously, the install does not proceed. The machine works fine with the 3.2, 3.3, and
3.4 installs, and is currently running 3.4R. The hardware includes:

K6 266
FIC PA2007 motherboard
64M SDRAM
Diamond Fireport 40 (Symbios 53c875)
Quantum Atlas III 4.5 UW

I am trying to do an ftp install.

How-To-Repeat: just attempt to do a 4.0R install
